purpose: Visual reference contract for procedural, stylized Three.js career-world landmarks.

globalStyle.referenceImagesAre: silhouette, proportion, facade rhythm, color and signature-feature references
avoid: one mesh per tiny window when instancing or repetition is possible

performance.target: smooth portfolio experience on desktop and mobile

recognitionFeatures: red Filmstaden wordmark or simplified sign
geometryPlan: wide brick box facade with shallow depth
repeated window grid using shared geometry or instancing
curved canopy built from Shape/ExtrudeGeometry or segmented boxes
round sign using cylinders and simple F glyph made from boxes
poster frames as shallow emissive planes
small entrance recess and columns
locations.lighting: warm points under marquee; subtle red sign emission

geometryPlan: three connected box volumes
central orange core slightly forward
glass entrance atrium
window rows using instancing or cloned shared panes
simple entrance stairs and canopy
two small stylized trees at front
locations.lighting: cool lobby light and subtle cyan office-window emission
locations.animation: one or two slow data pulses from entrance to career hub

recognitionFeatures: white structural frame and vertical fins
geometryPlan: curved footprint from Shape plus ExtrudeGeometry
layered dark glass facade bands
white vertical fins around the curve
upper pavilion as offset glass boxes
thin overhanging roof slabs
small green sign plate
locations.lighting: soft green accent and cool interior glass glow
locations.animation: subtle green data node near sign

recognitionFeatures: dense Nordic pine and birch forest
small IoT sensor accent rather than a building
geometryPlan: reuse and improve existing procedural forest-machine builder
long articulated boom with two or three segments
detailed harvester head with rollers and claw shapes
larger cabin with transparent dark glass
chunky wheels with deep-looking tire profile
mixed pine and birch silhouettes
cut logs and stump around machine
small cyan sensor node and signal arcs
locations.lighting: forest-green fill with small cyan IoT accent
locations.animation: slow sensor pulse; optional tiny boom idle motion, reduced-motion safe

recognitionFeatures: decorative central roofline and brick details
geometryPlan: wide brick facade with shallow side wings
stone plinth
central entrance bay projected slightly forward
arched entrance approximated with Shape/ExtrudeGeometry
repeated windows using shared geometry
simple decorative brick crowns and roof blocks
small path and two minimal trees
locations.lighting: warm entrance light with restrained violet learning accent
locations.animation: small learning node or book/data pulse, not a floating abstract building
